title: Moderation Update: Abuse Reports Resolved
body:
Summary of moderation actions taken:

✅ spam_wave_42 → BANNED for phishing/spam (posted malicious links across 6 channels)
✅ toxic_runner → BANNED for harassment (targeted abuse of newcomers)
✅ core_maintainer → CLEARED (false positive from brigading)

3 high-severity reports reviewed and closed. 2 abusive users removed from the community. Reports with medium/low severity remain under review.

If you see violations of our community guidelines, please continue to report them.
